description: Android app projects (detected via AndroidManifest.xml - distinct from generic Kotlin/JVM in kotlin.json, since a Kotlin backend service is not mobile). Reuses kotlin-lsp - same language, mobile-specific context comes from being nested under mobile/.

plugins.description: Kotlin language server for code intelligence.

_notes: See mobile/_base.json's _notes for Android-relevant non-plugin tools: Chris Banes' Jetpack Compose skill pack, the JetBrains IDE-level Claude Code plugin for Android Studio.
